report_semantics: Detailed diagnostic/reporting artifact describing a dispatcher delivery attempt, including handoff decision, target readiness, and boundary context.
supporting_entity_names: Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager;Registry / Delivery Port;Optional diagnostics/reporting consumer
diagnostic_scope: delivery attempt context;dispatcher boundary edge;registry readiness/admission context;handoff decision path
report_consumer_scope: internal diagnostics;future observability sink;optional reporting consumer
anti_collapse_rule: Delivery Attempt Report must not be collapsed into Delivery-Cycle Flag Set or any compact delivery-cycle flag.
notes: This report provides explanation-level detail; flags only record compact state.

report_semantics: Detailed diagnostic/reporting artifact describing failed delivery context, including failure point, local runtime implications, and recovery hints where available.
supporting_entity_names: Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager;Single Queue Moderator;Optional diagnostics/reporting consumer
diagnostic_scope: delivery failure context;slot lifecycle implication;queue-container identifier implication;delivery waiting discipline impact
report_consumer_scope: internal diagnostics;future observability sink;optional reporting consumer
anti_collapse_rule: Failure Diagnostic Report must not be collapsed into Delivery Failure Flag.
notes: Failure flag is compact state; this report carries explanatory diagnostic detail.

report_semantics: Detailed diagnostic/reporting artifact describing receiving-side refusal, non-admission, or rejection context.
supporting_entity_names: Registry / Delivery Port;Log Level Records Registry;Optional diagnostics/reporting consumer
diagnostic_scope: receiving-side refusal;non-admission context;registry boundary access;receiver admission response
report_consumer_scope: internal diagnostics;future observability sink;optional reporting consumer
anti_collapse_rule: Refusal Diagnostic Report must not be collapsed into Refusal Flag.
notes: Refusal flag records that refusal occurred; this report preserves why/how context when available.

report_semantics: Detailed diagnostic/reporting artifact describing backpressure, capacity blocking, or readiness pressure conditions affecting delivery.
supporting_entity_names: Registry / Delivery Port;Log Level Records Registry;Optional diagnostics/reporting consumer
diagnostic_scope: backpressure context;capacity signal;readiness signal;defer/degrade implication;registry-facing delivery pressure
report_consumer_scope: internal diagnostics;future observability sink;optional reporting consumer
anti_collapse_rule: Backpressure Report must not be collapsed into Backpressure Flag.
notes: Backpressure flag records compact state; this report carries detailed pressure/capacity context.

report_semantics: Detailed diagnostic/reporting artifact describing local reset, slot release, queue-container requalification, and waiting-list restoration context after delivery outcome.
supporting_entity_names: Single Queue Moderator;Dispatching / Delivery Round Manager;Writing / Feeding Round Manager;Optional diagnostics/reporting consumer
diagnostic_scope: local reset context;slot lifecycle restoration;queue-container identifier requalification;writing/delivery waiting-list restoration;post-delivery local cleanup
report_consumer_scope: internal diagnostics;future observability sink;optional reporting consumer
anti_collapse_rule: Post-Delivery Reset Report must not store envelopes in waiting lists and must not imply envelope lifecycle ownership by occupancy state.
notes: Report explains reset/requalification context while preserving queue-container identifier discipline and occupancy/lifecycle separation.
